question: MigrainePredict processes users' heart-rate and sleep data to predict migraine attacks. Users give explicit consent to this processing when they sign up. Is this processing allowed under the GDPR?

A MigrainePredict user has asked for all their personal data to be deleted, but the company wants to keep the data because it is needed for a scientific research study. Must the company delete the data?
MigrainePredict is a wearable device system that uses AI to predict migraine attacks and is certified as a medical device. Is it classified as a high-risk AI system under the EU AI Act?
Can MigrainePredict use cookies on its public marketing website to track visitor numbers?
